jp_equivalent_sets.name: Re:Zero Vol.3 (JP)
jp_equivalent_sets.note: This is the JP set whose EN version (Vol.3) is being analyzed

competitive_notes: Re:Zero has tournament presence but is not currently top-tier in BCS 24/25. Viable for locals and regionals. Vol.3 JP may introduce new competitive pieces.
expected_en_preorder_price_note: Standard EN WS booster boxes trend $85-105. Using $90 as baseline for EV comparison.

series_continuation.reasoning: Re:Zero is a long-running light novel series (Tappei Nagatsuki, Kadokawa) with no announced ending. The main story is ongoing; arc 7 is still being written as of 2025. The anime has covered through arc 4 (season 2). Arcs 5 and beyond remain unadapted.
series_continuation.notes: A third anime season adapting arc 5+ would significantly boost demand for EN WS sets. No season 3 announcement as of 2026-05-10, but community expectation is high given the arc 4 conclusion. Bushiroad has released Vol.1, Vol.2, Memory Snow, and Frozen Bond in EN — this is the 5th EN release, indicating sustained publisher commitment.
series_continuation.demand_impact: Ongoing IP with high season 3 anticipation. If season 3 is announced before or during the EN release window, expect a significant demand spike. Even without announcement, prior sets have shown strong long-term appreciation, suggesting collector floor is solid.
